title: Anwesha's Birthday Bash
description: Today is the day! Anwesha's birthday celebration is live. Join us for cake, code, and lots of love. The spotlight is on her — our favorite birthday girl who debugs hearts and compiles smiles!

title: Love at First Byte
description: On this Valentine's Day, Anwesha discovered that the only thing better than a perfect function is a perfect partner. She merged her heart with happiness and pushed it to the main branch of life!

title: Portfolio Panic
description: April Fools! Anwesha tried to deploy her portfolio but accidentally pushed her love letters instead. The internet loved it. Now her README has more stars than her repos!

title: Falling for Bugs
description: Anwesha spent all night debugging, only to realize the real bug was in her heart — it kept looping back to the same person. Infinite love loop detected!
